top_signals.title: This year, the Oscars of the food world wasn’t really about food
top_signals.summary: At Monday’s James Beard Awards in Chicago, winner after winner stood up for the immigrants who keep America’s restaurants running

top_signals.title: Ships Can Use Hormuz Southern Route With Signals On, JMIC Says
top_signals.summary: Ships can consider transiting the Strait of Hormuz along the southern route, day or night, with their transponder signals on, a key naval information group has said.

top_signals.title: Platitudes in women’s sport are empty, patronising and offensive
top_signals.summary: Georgia Bridgwood argues that women’s sport should rid itself of platitudes; they’re empty, patronising and offensive. “You got this,” proclaimed Adidas. “Thirsty for more,” said Pepsi. “You don’t get it,” I thought to myself. In our exploration of ‘now what?’ for women’s sport at SXSW London this month, the panel dug into why we’re in [...]
